Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
15 
BENE_STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Residence (SSA) State Code 
DESCRIPTION: The social security administration (SSA) standard 2-digit state code of a beneficiary's residence. 
SHORT NAME: STATE_CD 
LONG NAME: BENE_STATE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
SSA/EDB 
VALUES: 
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
03 = Arizona 
04 = Arkansas 
05 = California 
06 = Colorado 
07 =
